name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Credential Exfiltration in Amazon GuardDuty
notes: This Building Block defines when credential exfiltration in Amazon GuardDuty is detected.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Credential Exfiltration in Amazon GuardDuty on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon GuardDuty
when the event QID is one of the following (111000033) UnauthorizedAccess:IAMUser/InstanceCredentialExfiltration
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Credential Exfiltration in Amazon GuardDuty on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon GuardDuty
AND when the event QID is one of the following (111000033) UnauthorizedAccess:IAMUser/InstanceCredentialExfiltration
